heading: National Technology and Innovation Medal
label: 3711 National Technology and Innovation Medal
notes: Amendments2007—, which directed substitution of “National Technology and Innovation Medal” for “National Medal” in section catchline, was executed by making the substitution for “National Technology Medal” to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 110–69, § 1003(1)Subsec. (a). , substituted “Technology and Innovation Medal” for “Technology Medal”.Pub. L. 110–69, § 1003(2)

National Technology Medal for Environmental Technology, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–309, § 10112 Stat. 2939Oct. 30, 1998“In the administration of section 16 of the Stevenson-Wydler Technology Innovation Act of 1980 (), Environmental Technology shall be established as a separate nomination category with appropriate unique criteria for that category.”15 U.S.C. 3711

National Technology Medal for Environmental Technology, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–309, § 10112 Stat. 2939Oct. 30, 1998“In the administration of section 16 of the Stevenson-Wydler Technology Innovation Act of 1980 (), Environmental Technology shall be established as a separate nomination category with appropriate unique criteria for that category.”15 U.S.C. 3711

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is hereby established a National Technology and Innovation Medal, which shall be of such design and materials and bear such inscriptions as the President, on the basis of recommendations submitted by the Office of Science and Technology Policy, may prescribe.

children.heading: Award
children.label: b Award
children.text: The President shall periodically award the medal, on the basis of recommendations received from the Secretary or on the basis of such other information and evidence as he deems appropriate, to individuals or companies, which in his judgment are deserving of special recognition by reason of their outstanding contributions to the promotion of technology or technological manpower for the improvement of the economic, environmental, or social well-being of the United States.

children.heading: Presentation
children.label: c Presentation
children.text: The presentation of the award shall be made by the President with such ceremonies as he may deem proper.
